author: pk910
content:
The payload status in the attestation aggregate refers to the availability bit being set or not (AttestationData.index)
It shows what validators vote for,  not the actual payload status.


But it makes sense to add a pending state to the payload status indicator on the overview / slots list

author: potuz
content: Yes, it's a boolean but I agree with Enrico that it will help us visualize it if it's indicated as pending instead of empty when the committee is for the current slot. It's not a big deal though so if it's a lot of work you should prioritize other things

author: pk910
content:
Oh,  so this change request is really meant to be for the attestations tab?
So basically show "PENDING" if block.att[i].slot == block.slot - 1 && block.att[i].index == 0?

author: pk910
content: but the above attestation was included in slot 10562?

author: potuz
content: It's for when the attestation block root matches the block in the attestation slot, regardless of when it's included

author: potuz
content: Typically will happen in slot+1 but could be anytime

author: pk910
content:
aaaaah,  now I get it..

so  it's all related to the attestation.  `att.head == att.slot && att.index == 0`
